entry.title: 204. Count Primes
entry.content:
https://leetcode.com/problems/count-primes/

Check if number is prime number\
Naive solution: execution time (619 ms)

Finding Prime numbers - Sieve of Eratosthenes\
youtube

entry.title: 201. Bitwise AND of Numbers Range
entry.content:
https://leetcode.com/problems/bitwise-and-of-numbers-range/

intuitive solutions: exceed the time limit


Approach 1: Bit Shift

Approach 2: Brian Kernighan’s Algorithm (turn off the rightmost bit of one in a number)

entry.title: 190. Reverse Bits

https://leetcode.com/problems/reverse-bits/

Approach 1: Bit by Bit\
Explanation

Approach 3: Mask and Shift

entry.title: 187. Repeated DNA Sequences
entry.content:
https://leetcode.com/problems/repeated-dna-sequences/

Approach 1: Linear-time Slice Using Substring + HashSet

Approach 2: Rabin-Karp : Constant-time Slice Using Rolling Hash\
Rolling Hash Youtube

Approach 3: Bit Manipulation : Constant-time Slice Using Bitmask/
Bitmask Youtube

entry.title: solid mirror
Java Interview
entry.content:
• Top 50+ Core Java interview Q&As
  • JavaGuide

SOLID Principles

  • ref.1 (mirror) | ref.2 | ref.3 (clearer on DIP)

Design Patterns

  • Design patterns
  • MVC Pattern

Java Concurrency

Multithreading

  • Java Thread Tutorial: Creating Threads and Multithreading in Java
  • Java Multithreading and Concurrency Interview Questions

Synchronization

  • volatile keyword in Java

Java Collections

  • Java Collections

Java Serialization

  • transient keyword in Java
  • TRANSIENT AND FINAL INSTANCE VARIABLES IN JAVA
